items.a: Marvento is an adult-family-style co-living home in St. Augustine, Florida, designed for active seniors who want community, comfort, and light daily support.
Marvento is located in St. Augustine, Florida.
Marvento is designed for active seniors who value independence but appreciate having community, shared meals, and light support available.
Yes, each resident has their own private room.

items.q: Can a couple share a room?
items.a: Rooms are designed for single occupancy. Couples are welcome but would each need their own room.
Unfortunately, pets are not allowed at Marvento.
We offer assistance with daily activities, medication reminders, light housekeeping, and transportation to appointments.
Yes, transportation to medical appointments and local errands is included.
Monthly rates start at $1,500 and vary based on the room and level of support needed. We recommend scheduling a consultation for a personalized quote.

items.q: Is there a deposit or move-in fee?
items.a: Please schedule a consultation to discuss move-in costs and any applicable deposits.
We ask for a minimum 3-month commitment, but we are happy to discuss your specific situation.
The first step is scheduling a consultation — either by phone, video call, or an in-person tour. We will walk you through everything and answer all your questions.

items.q: Can I tour the home before committing?
items.a: Absolutely. We encourage in-person tours so you can see the home, meet the community, and ask questions.
